hooks.command: cmd=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.resume();process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tool_input.command||'')}catch(e){console.log('')}})"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgit push\b'; then out=$(cd /c/Code/Spyke && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'TypeScript check failed — fix errors before pushing:\n\n'+process.argv[1]}))" "$out"; exit 1; fi; fi

hooks.prompt:
A bash command was intercepted: $ARGUMENTS

Extract the value of tool_input.command from the JSON above.

If the command does NOT contain 'npm run deploy': immediately output {"continue": true} and stop — do not read any files or do anything else.

If the command DOES contain 'npm run deploy': read the file at .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md for your full instructions, then follow them exactly to review the recently changed files in /c/Code/Spyke before allowing the deploy.
